tech_news.title: TL;DW: Mayhem, Ranked 5s & More Dev Update - League of Legends
tech_news.description: A short rundown of changes from today’s Dev Update.

tech_news.title: /dev: The Return of Ranked 5s - League of Legends
tech_news.description: We’re experimenting with a new Ranked queue.

tech_news.title: Roku OS’s home screen now features a large, permanent ad - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: “I don't want recommendations! I know what I want to watch."

tech_news.title: Valve raises Steam Deck prices by more than $200 - The Verge
tech_news.description: Valve has raised the price of the Steam Deck OLED, with the 1TB model jumping to $949, and the 512GB version now costing $789.

tech_news.title: You can print, slice, and engrave using this desktop crafting machine - The Verge
tech_news.description: The $599 xTool M2 is the company’s most affordable laser cutting tool, but you can upgrade it with full-color printing capabilities and more powerful lasers.

tech_news.title: IO Interactive has a plan to keep you playing 007: First Light long after the credits roll - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: James Bond game 007: First Light isn't naturally replayable like Hitman World of Assassination, but developer IOI has something to help with that.

tech_news.title: Halide Mark III pro camera for iPhone arrives with three key photography upgrades - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: Halide’s big 3.0 upgrade has been on our radar since late 2024. Today, the pro camera app has arrived in...

tech_news.title: Sony’s Bravia 7 II makes a statement - The Verge
tech_news.description: While the tech is still new, Sony’s Bravia 7 II proves that RGB LED TVs are capable of serious performance.

tech_news.title: The Highest Metacritic Review-Scored Game Of 2026 Is ‘Mina The Hollower’ - Forbes
tech_news.description: Mina the Hollower is here and has amassed the single highest Metacritic score of 2026 so far but a decent margin.

tech_news.title: Here’s how Google is responding to Fitbit users who don’t like the new Health app - The Verge
tech_news.description: Google announced changes to the Google Health app after users complained about the Fitbit app replacement.
